narrative: US Dollar retreats as soft CPI trails estimates, driving a bull steepener in the Treasury curve — DXY -0.30%; gold higher +1.27% near $4,057; equities +0.38%; VIX 16.5. USD/JPY falls to 162.23 as yields slide, though 275bp Fed-BoJ carry sustains the broader bid; USD/CHF retreats to 0.8093. NZD/CHF bilateral divergence remains the week's dominant G10 theme (spread 1.448%). Watch the next BoC meeting.
